ItacAcademyItem.Name: Palladi (Accademia dei)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: For a rederence to the Palladi academy see Giuseppe Costanzo, Elogio d`Ignazio Paternò Castello Principe di Biscari, recitato nell`Accademia degli Ereino Palladi, Catania, 1786
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
